name: Jin Dynasty Standard (Swaggy)
author: Niki45nk
reasoning: Swaggy Professor's Jin standard — the highest-traction Jin build by far. One flexible opening that covers aggression and boom branches.

notes: Send all 3 mounted villager to mining camp gold Rally mounted villager to Reindeer deer
When you have 300 gold , 2 gold mounted villager go to sheep 1 gold mounted villager builds house , then also goes to sheep Use your scout to scout opponent's base

3 food mounted villager build great pasture Send 3 food mounted villager to gold Keep rally point mounted villager to food [If you are Tower Rushed] Immediately make a few mohe tribesman from great pasture to defend

Always train iron pagoda from great pasture ( mohe tribesman if you are spear rushed) Send 1 great pasture mounted villager to gold and 2 great pasture mounted villager to trees When you have 100 wood , 1 trees mounted villager builds grassland near great pasture , then goes to gold Use your iron pagoda to harass opponent's villager china or defend your own If opponent makes many spearman 1 , make a few mohe tribesman
When you have 8 food mounted villager , send them all to deer / boar and build mill Get mohe ancestry -> wheelbarrow at mill rally point mounted villager to gold
Send 5-8 gold mounted villager to build dragon pavilion at forward gold Send all other gold mounted villager to wood
Send all dragon pavilion mounted villager to gold Send emissary to nearby Trade Posts Build grassland near dragon pavilion Start getting Eco Upgrades Build blacksmith and monastery
